description.unified: Detonates lightning in front, dealing M.DMG to enemies within range and creates [Electric Field] for [3 sec->4sec]. [Electric Field]: Deals M.DMG every 0.4sec, and each hit has a 25% chance to stun enemies for [0.5sec->0.3sec].

For 15sec, increases M.DEF by 224*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and ATK Spd by [(added) 30%]. During the duration, on Normal Attack, has a 30% chance to deal 0.3 additional M.DMG to 2 allies and stun them for {7}sec.
Attacks enemies in a circular area around self, dealing M.DMG 3 time(s), then detonates lightning to deal M.DMG 3 times and stun enemies for [5sec->3sec].

On attack, infuses [Charge] into enemies not under [Shock], increasing M.DMG taken by 1% for 10sec. [Charge] stacks up to 30 times. At 30 stacks, consumes all stacks to deal M.DMG and inflict [Shock] for [7sec->5sec]. [Shock]: Increases duration of all received Stun effects by 0.7sec and increases M.DMG taken by [70%->40%].

light.unified: Mana cost increases by 1000, but DMG is increased by 80%.

dark.unified: Additional DMG is applied to up to 4 enemies.

light.unified: When there is only 1 enemy, DMG is increased by 100%.

dark.unified: Stun duration is increased by [2 sec->1.2 sec].

light.unified: [Shock] duration is increased by [2 sec->1.5 sec].

description.unified: [Lightning Strike! ] Increases the duration of the electric field by [1 sec->2 sec], and on each hit, increases own [ATK Spd->M.DEF] by {0}[->%] for 5 sec. This effect stacks up to [30->10] times.

[Power of Lightning! ] Converts the M.DEF increase effect into an ATK increase effect, and on attack, increases ATK by {0}% for 5 sec. [(removed) Changes effect irremovable and increases chance to trigger additional damage]

[Electric Explosion!] Grants [(added) immunity to CC during casting], and on each hit, has a {0}% chance to apply 3 stacks of Charge. This effect also Stacks on enemies in Shock state. [(removed) additional M.DMG and DEF reduction]
[Shock] Increases Magic DMG taken by enemies in Shock state by [100%->60%], and additionally reduces their M.DEF by {0}%. [(removed) normal attacks have {0}% chance to inflict Charge]
[Shock] duration is changed to {0}. When attacking a target in [Shock] state with a Normal Attack, reduces cooldown by {1}% and deals additional Magic DMG equal to [(added) 100% of ATK].

Summons the Soul of Eye of the Storm, Yanadis, dealing M.DMG to enemies in a wide frontal area and stunning them for 3sec. Afterwards, creates [Raging Magnetic Field] for 6sec. [Raging Magnetic Field]: Increases the duration of CC effects enemies take by 30%. [(removed) Enemies take 30% increased M.DMG]

1.from: Increases the duration of Raging Magnetic Field by 3 sec.
1.to: Increases the duration of [Raging Magnetic Field] by 3 sec.
1.unified: Increases the duration of [Raging Magnetic Field] by 3 sec.

2.from: Deals M.DMG equal to 3% of Sonia's Max HP every sec to enemies within Raging Magnetic Field.
2.to: Deals 25% of ATK + 3% of Sonia’s Max HP as M.DMG to enemies within [Raging Magnetic Field] every 1 sec.
2.unified: Deals 25% of ATK + 3% of Sonia’s Max HP as M.DMG to enemies within [Raging Magnetic Field] every 1 sec.
